title: tithymalus × pseudolucidus
intro: Tithymalus × pseudolucidus, a hybrid plant belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, is commonly known as a type of spurge. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly its sap, which contains toxic latex that has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Tithymalus × pseudolucidus include its potential to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a salve or ointment for topical application, and its latex can also be dried and used in herbal capsules or teas for internal use.
